overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking through a historic American city resembling New Orleans. The character moves from a secluded backyard courtyard through narrow alleys into bustling cobblestone streets with horse-drawn carriages and early electric streetcars.

scene_state.functional_zone: backyard courtyard with clotheslines and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a cluttered backyard courtyard with laundry hanging overhead

notable_agents.action: woman standing near wooden crates observing the area

entered.detail: multiple lines of hanging laundry strung between buildings overhead
weathered wooden picket fence enclosing the courtyard area
two-story red brick building with green shutters and external staircase
whitewashed brick wall with weathered paint and wooden door
stacked wooden crates and barrels near the fence line

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a secluded backyard courtyard enclosed by wooden fences and brick buildings. Clotheslines with laundry hang overhead, and various wooden crates and debris are scattered on the dirt ground. A woman stands near the left fence observing the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between brick and wooden buildings

events.description: approaching metal gate at the end of the narrow alley

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alleyway toward a metal gate leading to the street

entered.detail: tall wall made of horizontal wooden planks with green trim
exposed red brick wall with scattered debris at the base
black iron gate with circular decorative patterns blocking the exit

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a tight service alley flanked by a wooden plank wall on the left and a red brick wall on the right. The alley leads to a decorative metal gate that opens to the street beyond. The lighting is dimmer here, shaded by the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street intersection with balconies

events.description: exits alley through metal gate into open cobblestone street
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: pushes through the metal gate and steps onto the sunlit cobblestone street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the cobblestone road

entered.detail: uneven cobblestone paving covering the ground surface
single-story green wooden building with shingled roof and chimney
two-story blue wooden building with wraparound balcony and white trim
wooden telegraph pole with multiple crossbars and wires
simple wooden bench sitting on the sidewalk near the building

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the character enters a bright, open cobblestone street lined with historic wooden buildings featuring balconies and decorative trim. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, and utility poles with telegraph wires line the street. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed and shaded to open and sunlit.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with tram tracks and utility poles

events.description: electric streetcar moves past from right to left on tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street as a streetcar passes by

notable_agents.action: green electric streetcar moving along metal tracks embedded in the street

entered.detail: tall red brick building with curved corner and multiple windows
green electric streetcar with large windows and destination signage
tall pointed church steeple visible in the distance
weathered advertising posters pasted on the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the wide cobblestone main street, passing a large brick corner building. An electric streetcar moves along the tracks from right to left, and a church spire rises in the distance. The street is lined with utility poles and wires, and various pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with storefronts and painted advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past storefronts where men sit on benches

notable_agents.action: men sitting on wooden bench outside the storefront smoking

entered.detail: wooden awning extending over the sidewalk providing shade
large painted wall advertisement reading 'ALES WINES CIGARS' in white letters

segments.scene_description: The character walks under the wooden awnings of storefronts along the sidewalk, passing a large painted wall advertisement for 'ALES WINES CIGARS'. Men sit on benches outside the shops, and the street is shaded by the overhanging balconies. The environment feels more intimate and pedestrian-focused compared to the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, cluttered backyard into the bustling, sunlit activity of a historic city street. It begins in a dirt courtyard enclosed by wooden fences and brick buildings where laundry hangs overhead, before moving into a dim, narrow service alley flanked by a plank wall and red brick. As the camera passes through a decorative metal gate, the scene opens abruptly into a bright, wide cobblestone street lined with ornate wooden balconies and telegraph wires, where a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The perspective then expands further down the main thoroughfare, passing a large brick corner building as an electric streetcar glides across the tracks toward a distant church spire. Finally, the movement shifts back toward a more intimate scale, gliding under wooden storefront awnings and past a painted wall advertisement for ales and cigars while pedestrians linger on benches in the shade.
